# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: microservice-auth
spec:
  rules:
  - from:
    - podSelector:
        matchLabels:
          app: my-microservice-1
    to:
    - podSelector:
        matchLabels:
          app: my-microservice-2
  - from:
    - podSelector:
        matchLabels:
          app: my-microservice-3
    to:
    - serviceAccount:
        name: default
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: microservice-auth
spec:
  rules:
  - from:
    - podSelector:
        matchLabels:
          app: my-microservice-4
    to:
    - podSelector:
        matchLabels:
          app: my-microservice-5
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: microservice-auth
spec:
  rules:
  - from:
    - podSelector:
        matchLabels:
          app: my-microservice-6
    to:
    - serviceAccount:
        name: default
